subject: Re: Founders Associate Application — Northstar
body: Hi candidate, thank you for your application and the time you took for our calls. After much consideration, we've decided to move forward with another candidate whose profile aligns more closely with the operational scope of this role. We genuinely appreciated your enthusiasm. Best of luck with your search — feel free to stay in touch for future opportunities. Alex

subject: Apex Investment Analyst — next steps
body: Hi candidate, great chatting yesterday. We'd love to invite you to the next round — a deep-dive interview with our managing partner. Are you available Thursday 3pm CET? It will be ~60 minutes, focused on a market sizing case + portfolio review. Looking forward. Jordan

subject: Application received — Operating Associate
body: Thank you for your application to the Operating Associate role at Meridian. We'll review and get back within 2 weeks.

subject: Coffee chat — Orion Capital FA Program
body: Hi candidate, your application stood out. Before formal interviews, we'd love to set up an informal 30-min coffee chat to align expectations on the FA-Program. Suggest 3 slots next week and our team-lead will pick. Cheers, Talent Team

subject: Sienna Ventures Investment Analyst
body: Dear candidate, thanks for applying. While your background is impressive, we're looking for someone with deeper SaaS-metrics expertise for this specific role. We'll keep your CV on file and reach out if a better fit opens. Best, Sienna Team

subject: Quick question on your CV
body: Hi candidate, reviewing your application — could you share a brief example of a B2B deal you led during your studies? Even a 1-paragraph summary would help us assess fit faster. Thanks, Sam

subject: Harbor VC Investment Analyst — application received
body: Hi candidate, we've received your application. Our hiring process takes 4-6 weeks. We'll be in touch.

subject: Offer — Vertex Capital Investment Associate
body: Dear candidate, we are delighted to extend an offer for the Investment Associate role at Vertex Capital, Berlin. Compensation: 52k base + 5k performance bonus + standard benefits. Start date: flexible. Please find the formal offer letter attached. We hope you'll join us. Sincerely, HR
